ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., CS101) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., Introduction to Programming) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses required for this course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the course details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the term (e.g., current, past, future) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped) */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Audit status of the enrollment (e.g., for credit, audit) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date if the student withdraws from the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade assigned (on a 4.0 scale) */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  "letter_grade" TEXT /* Letter grade equivalent of the numeric grade */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Any comments or remarks about the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpas" (
  "gpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPA record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "prev_term_gpa" REAL /* Previous term GPA of the student */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term for which the GPAs are calculated */,
  "term_credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned in the term */,
  "cumulative_credits" INTEGER /* Total number of credits earned cumulatively */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpas_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpas_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "struggles" (
  "struggle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each struggle record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "struggle_level" INTEGER /* Level of struggle (1-5, with 5 being the most severe) */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for the struggle */,
  "support_provided" TEXT /* Support or interventions provided to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("struggle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_struggles_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_struggles_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_struggles_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_difficulties" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level assigned to the course (1-5, with 5 being the most difficult) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the difficulty level was last updated */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale for the assigned difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_difficulties_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., grades, enrollments) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
